items.caption: The interior of a coffee shop with a rustic brick wall. on the wall, there are two large menu boards with a black background and white text, listing various food and drink items along with their prices. the menu includes items such as "cappuccino," "the mediterranean," "the beast," "the souleater," "three strikes," and "almost famous grilled cheese." the menu also features a section for "brewed coffee" with options like "french press 32" and "organic hot tea." the counter has a red countertop with a black base, and there are various condiments and drink bottles displayed on it. the overall style of the image is a candid photograph with a focus on the menu boards and the interior design of the establishment.
